overview.title: Corporate Overview
overview.description1: Incorporated in Addis Ababa, Gibora Engineering PLC is a principal local force driving high-capacity telecom network transformations across Ethiopia.
overview.description2: We combine a highly skilled Ethiopian engineering force with unrivaled field execution capability to deliver business-critical projects under demanding turnaround schedules.
overview.ecaText: Holds a full operational Installation License for telecom infrastructure
overview.foaText: Registered Fiber Optic Association Partner ensuring global standards

qhv.safetyText: Zero-accident mandate. Every technician undergoes rigorous EHS training and utilizes certified PPE across all high-altitude tower operations.

qhv.visionText: To remain the principal local catalyst for Ethiopia's digital acceleration, delivering robust connectivity infrastructure that empowers every region.
